Work in context
AI agents are only as good as their context
Agents have the context they need before they act - ensuring work is being carried out confidently and accurately.
Agents have the context they need before they act - ensuring work is being carried out accurately.
Get Started
Full control
Agent activity
Track every agent action across your organization with a real-time log of what was done and when.
Permissions
Define exactly which data the agent can access, and whether it has permission to edit, create, or only read information.
Human in the loop
Validate your agents’ actions before activating it with simulation mode.
AI cost center
Track AI usage and spend per team and set limits and alerts.
Content ownership
You retain ownership of the content you provide, and the content generated by AI.
No data training
Your data is never used to train AI models — what happens in your workspace stays in your workspace.
Consider yourself limitless
An open platform for every agent your team works with

Go to homepage
Integrations & apps
Connect the tools you already use to work smarter
Discover 850+ integrations and apps to centralize work,
enhance collaboration, and drive better business results faster.
Get Started
Connectivity
Bring all your tools together
Integrate your favorite apps in seconds to create workflows for any need - bringing every team’s work into one place and keeping it perfectly aligned.
Get Started
Efficiency
Automate every workflow
Enable 2-way sync between monday products and any platform you work with to trigger automations, eliminate manual work, and keep your business in motion.
Get Started
Impact
Drive results with full visibility
Gain a real-time, cross-platform view that keeps data aligned and teams empowered — helping you make confident decisions and turn insight into measurable business impact.
Get Started
Integrations for every use case
Sales tracking
Customer support management
Code alignment
Team collaboration
Campaign optimization
Sales tracking
Close deals faster
Integrate Salesforce, Quickbooks, or HubSpot to manage leads, track opportunities, and keep your sales process proactive and results-driven.
Customer support management
Stay on top of every request
Connect Zendesk or Active Directory to manage your support tickets in monday.com, helping teams resolve issues faster and keep customers happy.
Code alignment
Keep development and delivery on track
Link pull requests from GitHub or GitLab directly to their related items in monday.com so teams can quickly access code and updates in context.
Team collaboration
Keep teams connected
Integrate your org’s communication tools - Slack, Gmail, Google Calendar, Outlook, Microsoft Teams, and more - to centralize communication and keep work flowing smoothly across channels.
Campaign optimization
Optimize campaign performance
Integrate Mailchimp, Intercom, or Google Ads to track campaign performance, refine strategies, and turn insights into growth.
“monday has all the functionalities and integrations we need without being unnecessarily complicated.”
Naomi M.
Head of Client Success
“monday.com's integrations with other software tools allow for seamless collaboration and project management across teams.”
Ray A.
Director of Customer Experience
“The integration available with Outlook has also helped ensure that important tasks received via emails are not missed and are completed within time.”
Jim M.
Real Estate Agent
Use your go-to AI assistants
Work with tools like Claude, Copilot, and ChatGPT through official integrations or the monday MCP, and keep data secure with trusted AI connectors.
Tailor your workflows with the monday marketplace
Enhance the monday.com experience with apps and integrations built by our trusted partners, helping you customize your workflow to your needs and add new functionality as you grow.
Explore the marketplace
Connect via no-code platforms
Easily connect monday.com to thousands of other tools with - no development needed.
Create a custom solution
Build your own integrations
Use our flexible APIs, SDKs to build custom apps and integrations tailored to your  unique needs.
Explore developer docs
Join as a marketplace partner
Turn your idea into monday app, reach 225,000+ customers, and grow your business on our marketplace.
Become a marketplace partner

hits.title: MondayDB: A new in-house data engine from monday.com
Ask HN: Does anyone use monday.com? Is it better than the others?
Why Monday.com decided to build its new database instead of buying one
Monday.com Shares Jump at IPO, Minting Cloud Software Billionaire in Israel

analysis.name: Monday.com
analysis.value_proposition: An AI work platform where people and agents drive results together across projects, CRM, dev, marketing, and IT service.
analysis.ideal_customer: Cross-functional teams at SMB through Fortune 500 companies looking for a configurable work OS spanning PMO, marketing, ops, IT, HR, sales, and product/dev

features.name: boards
features.description: Configurable boards for organizing projects, clients, and processes
features.evidence_quote: Boards are the place for organizing all your work and data

features.name: docs
features.description: Collaborative real-time documents that connect to live board data
features.evidence_quote: Create docs and collaborate with your team in real time

features.name: templates
features.description: 200+ prebuilt templates for common industries and workflows
features.evidence_quote: Choose from over 200+ templates for every industry

features.name: column types
features.description: Variety of column types to structure board data
features.evidence_quote: Build your board the way you want with a variety of column types

features.name: mobile apps
features.description: iOS and Android apps for on-the-go access
features.evidence_quote: iOS and Android apps

features.name: unlimited free viewers
features.description: Read-only viewer accounts at no cost
features.evidence_quote: Viewers have read-only access to your account data

features.name: unlimited items
features.description: No cap on the number of items/rows in boards
features.evidence_quote: Items are the rows in monday.com boards

features.name: automations
features.description: No-code automation rules for repetitive workflows
features.evidence_quote: Save precious time by automating repetitive tasks in your boards

features.name: integrations
features.description: Native integrations with 850+ third-party tools
features.evidence_quote: Discover 850+ integrations and apps to centralize work

features.name: timeline view
features.description: Visual timeline of upcoming work
features.evidence_quote: See all upcoming work in a visual timeline

features.name: gantt view
features.description: Gantt charts for deadline tracking
features.evidence_quote: use Gantt charts to ensure you're meeting deadlines

features.name: calendar view
features.description: Visual calendar to manage upcoming work
features.evidence_quote: Manage all your upcoming work using a visual calendar

features.name: guest access
features.description: External guest users limited to invited boards
features.evidence_quote: Guests are external users who can only access boards you invite

features.name: api access
features.description: REST/GraphQL API for reading and updating monday data
features.evidence_quote: Enable agents, integrations, and custom apps to read and update monday data

features.name: private boards
features.description: Boards restricted to invited members
features.evidence_quote: Private boards and docs are only visible to you and team members you invite

features.name: advanced board views
features.description: Charts, graphs, and diagrams for data visualization
features.evidence_quote: Visualize your data with different types of charts, graphs and diagrams

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Track time spent per task
features.evidence_quote: Track and monitor the time spent on each task

features.name: advanced columns
features.description: Dependencies, formulas, and complex calculations
features.evidence_quote: create dynamic dependencies between tasks and perform complex automated calculations

features.name: dashboards
features.description: Cross-board dashboards and reporting
features.evidence_quote: Dashboards & reporting

features.name: forms
features.description: Native form builder to collect requests and data
features.evidence_quote: Forms

features.name: kanban view
features.description: Kanban board view for workflow management
features.evidence_quote: Kanban

features.name: files management
features.description: Upload and manage file attachments
features.evidence_quote: Files

features.name: ai agents
features.description: Autonomous agents that perform specialized workflow tasks
features.evidence_quote: You lead. Agents act.

features.name: agent builder
features.description: Tool to build custom agents for any workflow
features.evidence_quote: Build a custom agent for any specific workflow or job

features.name: ai sidekick assistant
features.description: Context-aware AI assistant that runs and connects work
features.evidence_quote: Sidekick is an intelligent context-aware AI assistant

features.name: ai meeting notetaker
features.description: Records meetings and extracts action items
features.evidence_quote: Notetaker keeps your team focused during meetings

features.name: vibe app builder
features.description: Turn a business need into a custom app via natural language
features.evidence_quote: Turn any business need into a custom business app in minutes

features.name: ai columns
features.description: Column-embedded AI that runs repetitive tasks in boards
features.evidence_quote: AI columns run your repetitive work directly within your boards

features.name: ai workflow builder
features.description: Orchestrates multi-step agent-driven workflows
features.evidence_quote: Orchestrate workflows that connect agents and AI

features.name: research agents
features.description: Prebuilt agents that surface intelligence and insights
features.evidence_quote: Surface deep intelligence and actionable insights

features.name: reporting agents
features.description: Automate scheduled status updates and reports
features.evidence_quote: Automate status updates and performance reports on a set schedule

features.name: insights agents
features.description: Detect risks and progress gaps proactively
features.evidence_quote: Spot risks and progress gaps before they become problems

features.name: meeting assistant agents
features.description: Schedule meetings, summarize calls, extract action items
features.evidence_quote: Schedule meetings, summarize calls, and extract action items

features.name: process optimizer agents
features.description: Identify redundant processes and clean up data
features.evidence_quote: Identify, fix, and remove redundant or outdated data and processes

differentiators: AI work platform where people and agents work side by side
Custom agent builder covering any use case
Vibe app builder for turning business needs into apps
One platform spanning work management, CRM, dev, service, and campaigns
Trusted by over 60% of the Fortune 500

recent_ships.source: Sidekick is an intelligent context-aware AI assistant
AI columns run your repetitive work directly within your boards
Turn any business need into a custom business app in minutes

recent_ships.what: AI workflow builder for agent orchestration
recent_ships.source: Orchestrate workflows that connect agents and AI

recent_ships.what: Elevate conference keynotes and AI masterclasses on-demand
recent_ships.source: Elevate's industry-leading keynotes, hands-on masterclasses, and actionable AI insights, now available on demand

praised: monday has all the functionalities and integrations we need without being unnecessarily complicated
monday.com's integrations with other software tools allow for seamless collaboration and project management
The integration available with Outlook has also helped ensure that important tasks received via emails are not missed
complaints: HN commenters question whether it is materially better than competing alternatives (Ask HN: Does anyone use monday.com? Is it better than the others?)
Security concerns raised in the past around SendGrid compromise thread

free_tier.limits: Up to 2 seats, 3 boards, 3 docs, 8 column types

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 2 seats, 3 boards, 3 docs, 200+ templates, iOS/Android apps

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited free viewers, unlimited items, Sidekick, Vibe builder, 1,000 AI credits/mo

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: Automations & integrations (250/mo), timeline/Gantt/calendar, guest access, notetaker, AI columns

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 25k automations/integrations, private boards, advanced views, time tracking, AI workflow builder

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom pricing, custom AI credits, advanced security, discounts available

pricing.notes: Seat-based; yearly billing saves 18%; AI credits bundled per tier (1k/2k/3k/custom) with add-on packs; API call limits scale by tier (1k/day Standard, 10k/day Pro); special promotional $10-$30/mo discounts shown on pricing page

recent_hn.title: We Shortened Development Feedback Loops from 30M to 30s
